content: We can reframe the task-agnostic Self-Refine framework as a base architecture to formalize chaotic multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, turning isolated reflection perspectives into an iterative self-feedback loop that requires no extra supervised training or external reward signals. This creates a lightweight plug-and-play reflection system that leverages the strengths of both approaches: the training-free efficiency of Self-Refine and the error-detection power of multiple inconsistent reflection perspectives.
